choice: Yes — IRS RMD table on tax-deferred accounts, modeled in v1
rationale: Decision 9032d3c9 explicitly names 'missing RMDs' as a known Excel simplification treated as a defect to fix, not behavior to reproduce — placing RMDs squarely inside v1 scope. Decision 8a2f4e15 establishes that the tax-deferred bucket holds rollover IRAs, which are the exact accounts subject to age-73/75 RMDs. Decision 9a5db500 establishes the v1 tax model applies progressive brackets to ordinary income including tax-deferred withdrawals, providing the exact machinery needed to absorb forced RMD income. All three priors together fully determine the choice: RMDs are in v1.
